def solve(*args):
    if not args:
        return None
    
    # Assuming args[0] is the path to the PDF file
    pdf_path = args[0]
    
    # Placeholder for actual PDF to XML conversion logic
    # This is where the OCR processing would occur
    # For now, we will return a dummy XML structure for demonstration
    xml_output = "<root><message>Processed PDF: {}</message></root>".format(pdf_path)
    
    return xml_output
